ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(UAE_Resident__c, "Yes"), OR( ISBLANK( Emirates_No__c ), ISBLANK( Passport_Issue_Date__c ), ISBLANK( Passport_Expiry_Date__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For UAE Residents, Emirates ID, Passport Issue Date, and Passport Expiry Date are mandatory.
